0d6606ff7609.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
0d6606ff7609.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
0d6606ff7609.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

804dabe669bc.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
804dabe669bc.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
804dabe669bc.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

5a56de5cd885.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5a56de5cd885.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

db42f55c2687.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
db42f55c2687.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
db42f55c2687.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

bff3fa18b335.title: Ranked #16 of 18 locally — peers are ahead
bff3fa18b335.description: At percentile 11.8, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

35a24e345e3f.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
35a24e345e3f.description: You trail peers by 1.3 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

c342b2599bd6.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
c342b2599bd6.description: You trail peers by 1.7 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
